_schemaVersionSource: src/features/business-dna/schemas/business-dna-profile.schema.ts → BUSINESS_DNA_PROFILE_SCHEMA_VERSION — keep this value in sync; validate-packages.ts checks it.
_businessCountNote: Counts only packages with metadata.status === "published". ai-automation-agency is status "template" — a placeholder structure, not a registered business — so it contributes 0. The 4 Professional Services packages (accounting-firm, financial-consultancy, insurance-brokerage, tax-consultancy) plus the 4 Taxonomy Expansion packages (law-firm, hr-consultancy, recruitment-agency, business-consultancy) are all status "published", contributing 8. software-house, web-development-agency, and ai-consulting (Knowledge Authoring Batch 1, Technology Services expansion) are also "published", contributing a 9th, 10th, and 11th. mobile-app-development-agency, cybersecurity-consultancy, it-managed-services, devops-consultancy, and data-analytics-consultancy (Batch 2) contribute a 12th through 16th, completing all 9 planned technology-services businesses. marketing-agency, ecommerce-brand, coaching-business, architecture-studio, and real-estate-agency (Batch 3, first flagship businesses authored under the new marketing-agencies, ecommerce, coaching, architecture, and real-estate categories) contribute a 17th through 21st. cleaning-company, beauty-salon, dental-clinic, veterinary-clinic, and psychology-practice (Batch 4, first flagship businesses authored under the new cleaning-services, beauty-wellness, dental-clinics, veterinary-clinics, and psychology-practices categories) contribute a 22nd through 26th. Dental, veterinary, and psychology are all regulated/licensed healthcare-adjacent practices framed as business-planning content only, with no clinical, diagnostic, or treatment guidance. coffee-shop and restaurant (Batch 5, final batch, first flagship businesses authored under the new coffee-shops and restaurants categories) contribute a 27th and 28th, completing all 12 new canonical categories introduced in the 2026-07-10 Taxonomy Expansion. See docs/domain/06-business-catalog.md.
